title: SemEval-2017 Task 4 - Sentiment Multi-Rating
description: Multi-dimensional sentiment rating of tweets based on SemEval-2017 Task 4 (Rosenthal et al.). Annotators rate tweets on multiple dimensions including sentiment intensity, subjectivity, and emotion strength, along with an overall sentiment label.
citation:
@inproceedings{rosenthal-etal-2017-semeval,
    title = "{S}em{E}val-2017 Task 4: Sentiment Analysis in {T}witter",
    author = "Rosenthal, Sara and Farra, Noura and Nakov, Preslav",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 11th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval-2017)",
    year = "2017",
    url = "https://aclanthology.org/S17-2088",
    pages = "502--518"
}
